settings.question: How long does tire installation take?
settings.answer: Most standard 4-tire installations take 45–60 minutes. If you also need balancing, TPMS work, or an alignment check, budget 90 minutes. We'll give you an accurate time estimate when you arrive, and our comfortable waiting area has free Wi-Fi so you can work while you wait.

settings.question: Do I need an appointment or can I walk in?
settings.answer: We accept walk-ins when availability allows, but booking online is the best way to guarantee your time slot — especially during busy seasons (October–November winter swap and March–April summer swap). Online booking takes under 2 minutes and you'll get a confirmation email immediately.

settings.question: What is included in a tire installation?
settings.answer: Every tire installation at Prince Tires includes: mounting the tire on your rim, computer dynamic balancing, valve stem check and replacement if worn, torque to manufacturer spec using a calibrated torque wrench, and a complimentary TPMS sensor inspection. We don't cut corners.

settings.question: Can you install tires I bought online?
settings.answer: Yes. Bring in any tires — purchased online, from a dealership, or another shop — and we'll mount and balance them. We charge a flat installation rate per tire with no surcharges for outside purchases.

settings.question: Do you dispose of old tires?
settings.answer: Yes, we handle responsible tire disposal included in your installation. Alberta's tire recycling levy ensures your old tires are processed through a certified recycling program. You don't need to worry about what to do with your old tires — we take care of it.

settings.heading: Tire Installation Calgary
settings.subheading: Fast, professional tire installation at our SW Calgary shop. Book online in 2 minutes and drive away the same day — torque-checked and balanced.
settings.pricing_intro: Flat-rate tire installation with no hidden fees. Every installation includes mounting, computer balancing, valve stem inspection, torque check to spec, and TPMS sensor inspection. Bring your own tires or shop our in-store selection.
